prompt: Camera move left, pull out, then pan left. A refinery service yard at night erupts into chaos beside stacked steel pipes and a concrete drainage trench. A ruptured fuel line spits a ragged orange flame that licks under a half-open loading gantry while black smoke rolls upward and then shears sideways in hard wind. Fire suppressant water blasts from a broken overhead main, hitting hot metal and bursting into white steam, glittering droplets, and muddy runoff. Loose tarps snap against chain-link fencing, warning lights strobe through haze, and small fragments of insulation tumble across oil-slick ground as the wider industrial maze and spreading damage come into view.

Camera move right, pull out, then pan right. In a launch complex at dawn, a sleek experimental rocket stands on a scorched pad ringed by service towers, cryogenic lines, and flood channels. Frost rapidly creeps across the lower hull, then sheets of condensed vapor spill down the sides and pour over the platform like a cold waterfall. Umbilicals detach in sequence, vents pulse, and the exhaust trench begins to shimmer with heat. Ignition blooms from dim violet flicker to a violent white-orange core, hammering dust, pooled rainwater, and loose gravel outward. As the vehicle rises, its plume carves twisting layers through the low fog and reveals the full geometry of the facility.

Camera fixed. A packed indoor futsal court seen from mid-stands during the final seconds of a championship match, with polished floor markings, ad boards, benches, and draped team banners all clearly readable. Players in contrasting kits swarm the penalty area in overlapping runs while defenders slide, a goalkeeper lunges, and substitutes on the sideline leap to their feet. The ball ricochets off a shin, clips the post, rebounds into a cluster of legs, and finally breaks free toward the center spot. In the crowd, rows of fans rise in a wave, scarves whipping, phones flashing, faces changing from suspense to eruption as confetti cannons misfire early near the rafters.

Camera pull out. A coastal road cut beneath a dark volcanic hillside becomes a scene of cascading destruction as an ash-laden storm meets fresh lava runoff. Rain slams the pavement, turning dust into gray slurry while chunks of hot rock bounce through a guardrail and smash the windows of an abandoned bus. Seawater surges against the embankment below, sending explosive fans of spray over cracked asphalt. A utility pole snaps, dragging live lines into a shower of sparks that hiss in floodwater. Smoke, steam, ash, and orange glow stack into dense layers, and the expanding disaster reveals stranded vehicles, broken signage, and the full sweep of the battered shoreline.
